reference: SO ALI RELATED TO HIM ALL THAT HAD PASSED FROM FIRST TO LAST AND THE CALIPH SAID I HAD NOT THOUGHT THOU WOULDST KILL HIM FOR THAT HE WAS A SORCERER
text: So Ali related to him all that had passed from first to last, and the Caliph said, "I had not thought thou wouldst kill him, for that he was a sorcerer."
